message:
feat(macros): implement computed field support (bd-ntpn)

Add @computed_field equivalent for deriving field values from methods:

FieldDef and FieldInfo changes:
- Add `computed: Option<String>` field for method name
- Add `is_computed()` and `is_db_field()` helper methods
- Add `computed()` and `computed_opt()` builder methods for FieldInfo

ModelDef changes:
- Add `computed_fields()` to get computed fields
- Update `select_fields()`, `insert_fields()`, `update_fields()` to exclude computed fields

Parsing:
- Parse `#[sqlmodel(computed = "method_name")]` attribute
- Validate computed fields cannot be primary keys
- Validate computed fields cannot have foreign keys
- Validate computed fields cannot have default values

Usage:
```rust
#[derive(Model)]
struct User {
    first_name: String,
    last_name: String,
    #[sqlmodel(computed = "compute_full_name")]
    #[serde(skip_deserializing)]
    full_name: String,
}

impl User {
    fn compute_full_name(&self) -> String {
        format!("{} {}", self.first_name, self.last_name)
    }
}
```

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
